---
title: Spatial Data Science Summit 2026 Reimbursement Information
---

This page introduces the reimbursement process for attendees of the 2026 Spatial Data Science Summit. 
Please read through the following information to ensure a smooth reimbursement experience.


## General Process
### Step 1: Vendor Registration Email
::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="45%"}

Each attendee will receive an email invitation to register as a vendor in PaymentWorks.
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}
![](files/invitation_email.png){width=90% fig-alt="Vendor registration invitation email"}
:::

:::

### Step 2: Register Your Account
::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="45%"}

After completing the registration form, you will receive an activation email and log in once more.
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}
![](files/register1.png){width=90% fig-alt="Vendor registration screen"}
:::

:::

### Step 3: Multi-Factor Authentication
::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="45%"}

You will be asked to complete multi-factor authentication using your phone number.
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}
![](files/multifactor.png){width=90% fig-alt="Multi-factor authentication screen"}
:::

:::

### Final Step: Complete Registration Based on Your Tax Residency (Approx. 10 -15 Minutes)

Please follow the instructions according to your tax residency status to complete the registration process.
Instructions are available under the **US Individual** and **International Individual** tabs.

After submission, the SDSU Research Foundation will complete an internal review within five business days. 
Once approved, you will be set up as a vendor and eligible for payment or reimbursement.

After vendor setup and invoice submission:

- Direct deposit payments are issued on Tuesdays and Thursdays.
- Check payments are issued on Thursdays only.


## Required Documents:   
After you have completed the vendor registration process, please submit the following documents through [Submission_Link](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdyrfyg2fQ36ao0fChVgRaNczODZ-5RcdQlbyN5C4Q_hmtUyQ/viewform?usp=publish-editor)

- **Receipts for transportation and lodging.**
- **A filled [Travel Reimbursement Form](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1gnvgH35KitXtLpwvv8E47XNK_p2g4VP9/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=106028593616508914189&rtpof=true&sd=true)**
    - You may save a copy to your google drive and making edits. 
    - Per diem: Enter the per diem amount for each day of travel.
    - Lodging: You may enter the total lodging amount on the last day, but it is preferable to list the amount for each night separately.
    - **Please ensure every receipt is reflected in the Travel Reimbursement Form.**
